/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/EU_robot_arm_gui.dir/EU_robot_arm_gui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EU_robot_arm_gui.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EU_robot_arm_gui.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EU_robot_arm_gui.dir/ecworker.cpp.o -o EU_robot_arm_gui  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/etherlab/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.3 /opt/etherlab/lib/libethercat.so -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3
